content.en:
Valley of the Void Demons.

Ye Tian, Sui and the others entered the Void Demon Valley, and they had already sensed the breath of the Void Demon Beasts and the roars of many Void Demon Beasts.

"What a powerful suppression!"

Ye Tian seemed to feel the suppression of an ultimate space-time, and the heaven and earth of the space-time he was in were not worth mentioning compared to the Abyss of Aromu, let alone compared to here.

If a cultivator under the Ultimate Realm Lord came to the Void Demon Valley, the suppression of the ultimate particles alone would directly crush such a weak existence into powder.

Of course.

Even if a soldier like Sui came here, he was trembling, after all, the weakest Void Demon Beast here was comparable to a top-level soldier-level existence.

"Be careful, everyone!"

Sui whispered.

They moved forward slowly, perceiving everything around them, and suddenly the ultimate particles of an area stirred, and it was two Void Demon Beasts that were killing.

"Let's get closer!"

Ye Tian proposed.

"Well, let's go together!"

Everyone went over there together, and Sui also took out a hexagonal stone flake, and under the aura of this stone flake, everyone's breath was completely covered.

Soon, they came to a place and saw two Void Demon Beasts fighting.

There are countless eyes growing on one end, the skin is dark, everyone is looking at it, and they all feel some pain in their pupils, and the other party 110 seems to be an existence that cannot be looked at directly.

"Ten Thousand Pupils Void Demonic Beast!"

The crowd recognized it.

The other Void Demon Beast was a crimson humanoid demon wolf, and its strength seemed to be even more terrifying.

"Red Wolf!"

They recognized it again.

This is a two-headed soldier-level Void Demon Beast, and its strength is still within the range of what they can deal with, but they didn't do it immediately, it's okay to deal with one Void Demon Beast, if it is against two Void Demon Beasts at the same time, it will be a bit risky.

Thundered!!!!!

The two soldier-level Void Demon Beasts continued to fight and fight, and gradually began to get injured.

After a period of time, the injuries of these two soldier-level Void Demon Beasts were not light, but they did not continue to fight, but retreated a distance one after another, ready to forget it.

For them, there are only some contradictions between each other, and they have not yet reached the level of life and death, so there is no need to distinguish between life and death.

"Do it!"

Sui shouted.

They instantly rushed towards the Ten Thousand Pupils Void Demon Beast and surrounded the Ten Thousand Pupils Void Demon Beast.

And the Red Wolf didn't help, and chose to flee directly.

This situation is also expected by them.

"Kill!"

Sui and the others continued to attack the Red Wolf, and all kinds of ultimate killing moves were unleashed.

That's right, every soldier-level tribesman will have one or two ultimate killing moves, and it is very easy for them to master the ultimate killing moves, even if they don't comprehend the ultimate rules, but their body structure is to have the ultimate particles, and they can cast the power of the ultimate way, and they can burst out with the ultimate killing moves.

Of course, their ultimate killing move is definitely much less powerful than the real ultimate killing move, and both of them have flaws, which is not a complete ultimate killing move.

Suddenly.

The countless eyes of the Ten Thousand Pupils Void Demon Beast released countless purple lights, thinking about the ultimate void around them, and everyone was locked.

The flint stirred the hexagonal stone shards and turned them into a layer of light, resisting the purple light.

Immediately afterwards, everyone's ultimate killing move fell on the Ten Thousand Pupils Void Demon Beast, hitting it hard.

At this moment, a green leaf appeared on the body of the Ten Thousand Pupils Void Demon Beast, and this green leaf instantly turned into a blue light, as if it was about to escape with the Ten Thousand Pupils Void Demon Beast.

"Don't want to go!"

Sui also wanted to stop the Ten Thousand Pupils Void Demon Beast, and so did the others.

Seeing this, Ye Tian could only follow them to block the Ten Thousand Pupils Void Demon Beast.

Suddenly.

The blue light enveloped Ye Tian and Sui, and instantly crossed the Ultimate Void and came to a giant tree in the depths of the Void Demon Valley.

"Kill!" (CBAC) Sui and the others continued to attack, slashing the heavily injured Ten Thousand Pupils Void Demon Beast.

Just when they were happy to kill a Void Demon Beast, Ye Tian frowned and said, "Let's go deep into the Void Demon Valley, we're in some trouble!"

"What, deep into the Void Demon Valley?"

Sui and the others sensed the surroundings and found that they had indeed gone deep into the Void Demon Valley, and they panicked one by one.

At this moment, one after another Void Demonic Beasts appeared around, surrounding this place.

Among them, there are also military-level void demonic beasts that are much more terrifying than the Ten Thousand Pupils Void Demon Beast.

"Dead!"

Suidu began to be afraid.

Moreover, the Void Demon Valley is very special, and it cannot be transmitted here, which means that their elders have no way to know the situation here, and there is no way to save them.

Rumble!!!!

Dozens of soldier-level Void Demon Beasts were killed, and they didn't dare to resist.

It was at this time that Ye Tian made a move.

"The Ultimate Arcane - Tearing the Heavens!"

He held a long knife in his hand, and slashed out, and a void demonic beast was killed in an instant, and all the ultimate particles on his body were shattered by him.

Puff puff puff!!!

Ye Tian used the ultimate arcane technique of Nian Instant, shuttling between these soldier-level Void Demon Beasts, and killed all these soldier-level Void Demon Beasts in the blink of an eye.

In an instant, a dark shadow enveloped the void.

A giant palm composed of countless ultimate particles pressed down, it was the claw of the Red Desolation Wolf, and it was the claw of the general-level Red Desolation Wolf.

"General-level Void Demon Beast !!"

Ye Tian was not afraid at all, and crossed the void with the ultimate arcane technique of tearing the sky, slashed this claw, and then crossed the ultimate space, slashing a general-level void demonic beast, the wolf of the Red Desolation, and piercing its body.

However, the other party fled quickly and disappeared in the blink of an eye.

At this moment, Sui and the others were surprised.

"God, you're so powerful!!!!"

Sui exclaimed.

So many soldier-level Void Demon Beasts were killed by Ye Tian in the blink of an eye.

If they were not mistaken, a general-level void demonic beast appeared in the end, and it was also severely injured by Ye Tian.

This kind of strength is even more powerful than ordinary general-level existences!

And Ye Tian is just a soldier, and he is a partner who has not yet performed a coming-of-age ceremony like them!

For a while, they were full of admiration for Ye Tian.

"My strength, don't leak it out. "

Ye Tian reminded them.

"Well, let's not say it!" Sui They are not stupid, they know that Ye Tian is hiding his strength and keeping a low profile, and they will not deliberately leak it.
